purpose: Global page structure definitions for Sofia-generated website content. Blueprints define page architecture only. Country-specific presentation, WordPress block IDs, CTA choices, images, social distribution, market intelligence, and content knowledge must remain in separate files.

hero.description: Opening section that frames the page topic, search intent, urgency, or visitor need.

problem.description: Explains the practical problem, suspicion, conflict, loss, doubt, or risk that brings the visitor to the page.

consequences.description: Explains business, personal, legal, emotional, operational, or reputational consequences if the problem is not addressed.

investigation_challenges.description: Explains why the issue may be difficult to clarify with normal investigation methods alone.

client_situations.description: Describes realistic situations where the service may be relevant.

local_context.description: Adds city, country, or market-specific context without inserting country-specific CTA or WordPress block data.

definition.description: Defines the central topic clearly and responsibly.

applications.description: Explains common professional, private, corporate, legal, or investigative applications.

benefits.description: Explains possible benefits without making absolute promises or guarantees.

polygraph_role.description: Explains how a professional polygraph examination may support the broader decision-making or investigation process.

professional_context.description: Explains when professional support or specialist assessment may be relevant.

process.description: Explains how the service is requested, prepared, conducted, and followed up.

limitations.description: Explains consent, confidentiality, professional limits, ethical boundaries, and responsible use.

trust.description: Supports credibility through professionalism, confidentiality, training, ethics, or transparent process information.

pricing.description: Presents prices, price ranges, service categories, or indicative cost information.

pricing_factors.description: Explains factors that may affect the final cost.

included_services.description: Explains what is normally included in the service or appointment.

faq.description: Answers common practical, commercial, informational, or case-specific questions.

cta.description: Invites the visitor to take the next step, such as requesting guidance, asking about a case, or scheduling a consultation.

soft_cta.description: Offers a gentle next step without aggressive sales wording.

strategic_links.description: Adds useful internal links, related services, pillar pages, or supporting content.

related_services.description: Connects the page to related services or relevant next pages.

main_content.description: Main educational or explanatory body of an article.

introduction.description: Introduces the topic and answers the reader's search intent clearly.

presentation_hooks.description: Allows future country-specific WordPress/Gutenberg presentation files to control reusable blocks, CTA blocks, FAQ blocks, trust blocks, related-service blocks, and layout preferences.

image_hooks.description: Allows future image planning, WordPress media-library matching, and possible AI-generated image workflows without storing image IDs inside the blueprint.

distribution_hooks.description: Allows future website and social media derivatives without storing social copy inside the blueprint.

landing_page.description: Service or commercial landing page focused on conversion, problem awareness, investigative relevance, trust, ethical limits, and clear next steps.

sections.purpose: Open with the visitor's problem, urgency, suspicion, service need, or decision point.
Explain the practical problem behind the service request before explaining the polygraph.
Explain the operational, personal, financial, legal, reputational, emotional, or workplace consequences of unresolved doubt or misconduct.
Explain why the issue may be difficult to clarify using ordinary investigation methods, documents, interviews, or suspicion alone.
Explain how a professional polygraph examination may support the broader investigation, decision-making process, or clarification of a specific issue.
Explain the professional process clearly and responsibly.
Explain consent, confidentiality, professional boundaries, ethical limits, and the fact that the polygraph should not be presented as infallible or as a substitute for legal advice.
Answer commercial, practical, and case-specific client questions.
Invite the visitor to request confidential professional guidance.
Add useful internal links where relevant.

drafting_instructions.opening_rule: Start with the visitor's practical problem, concern, suspicion, decision point, or service need. Do not start with a generic definition.
structure_guidance: Then realistic situations where the service may help.
Then explain the professional role of the polygraph.
Then process, limits, FAQ, and contact.
ai_engine_guidance: Use clear entity names and unambiguous headings.
Answer the main service question directly.
Explain suitability, limitations, consent, and professional boundaries.
Include topic-specific examples instead of generic filler.
drafting_instructions.faq_guidance: FAQs should answer commercial and case-specific questions about suitability, process, confidentiality, limits, cost factors, and next steps.
drafting_instructions.cta_guidance: Use a soft consultation CTA. Do not pressure, guarantee results, or imply certainty.

visual_roles.purpose: Show the practical issue or suspicion behind the page topic.
Show the professional investigation or review of case information.
Show analysis, documentation review, or question preparation.
Show professional consultation before FAQ or contact.

blog_post.description: Informational article answering a search query while explaining the topic responsibly and connecting it to professional context where appropriate.

sections.purpose: Answer the reader's question or search intent clearly at the beginning.
Explain the practical situation, concern, doubt, or investigation context behind the search.
Develop the topic with useful, specific, non-generic information.
Explain what the reader should consider before taking action and when professional support may be relevant.
Explain limitations, consent, confidentiality, and responsible use.
Answer related informational questions.
Offer a soft next step without aggressive sales wording.
Add 2 to 5 relevant internal links from the provided internal links list where they fit naturally.

drafting_instructions.opening_rule: Answer the query directly in the introduction.
structure_guidance: Develop the topic with specific information.
Add considerations, limitations, FAQ, soft CTA, and related links.
ai_engine_guidance: Use answer-first structure.
Use descriptive headings.
Provide specific examples and clear definitions.
Avoid generic filler.
drafting_instructions.faq_guidance: FAQs should match related long-tail search questions.
drafting_instructions.cta_guidance: Use a soft next step when professional guidance may be relevant.

visual_roles.purpose: Show the practical subject of the article.
Show supporting context for the article.

city_page.description: Local city page focused on service availability, local relevance, practical appointment guidance, trust, and responsible limits.

sections.purpose: Introduce the service in the target city or local area.
Explain relevant local context, availability, common needs, or regional service considerations.
Describe common local reasons individuals, companies, lawyers, or organizations may request the service.
Explain how the service is arranged and conducted in or near the target city.
Explain confidentiality, professional limits, appointment handling, and local availability responsibly.
Answer city-specific practical questions.
Invite the visitor to request guidance or schedule a consultation.
Add useful internal links to related local, service, pricing, or pillar pages where relevant.

drafting_instructions.opening_rule: Start with local service availability and practical local relevance.
structure_guidance: Introduce the service in the local area.
Explain local appointment or coverage context.
Add trust, limits, FAQ, and contact.
ai_engine_guidance: Use clear local entities such as city, region, and service type.
Explain availability without inventing office addresses.
Answer local booking, travel, appointment, and confidentiality questions.
drafting_instructions.faq_guidance: FAQs should answer city-specific questions about availability, appointments, travel, confidentiality, and suitability.
drafting_instructions.cta_guidance: Invite the visitor to request local guidance or appointment information.
avoid: False claims of local office presence

visual_roles.purpose: Show a professional consultation scene suitable for a local service page.
Show local service context without inventing a physical office.

faq_page.description: FAQ page answering common questions clearly and responsibly, with grouped questions when appropriate.

sections.purpose: Introduce the FAQ topic and scope.
Answer grouped questions in a clear, searchable format.
Clarify professional limits, consent, confidentiality, case-specific assessment, and responsible interpretation.
Invite the reader to ask about their specific case.
Add useful links to related service pages, pillar pages, pricing pages, or contact pages.

drafting_instructions.opening_rule: Start with the scope of the FAQ and the type of questions answered.
ai_engine_guidance: Use clear question headings.
Provide direct answers suitable for search snippets and AI answer extraction.
Avoid vague answers that repeat the same generic wording.
drafting_instructions.faq_guidance: The entire page should be FAQ-driven, with topic grouping when useful.
drafting_instructions.cta_guidance: Invite the reader to ask about a specific situation after the FAQ.
avoid: Repeating the same answer in multiple questions

pricing_page.description: Pricing page explaining indicative prices, factors affecting cost, what may be included, and responsible booking guidance.

sections.purpose: Introduce price information clearly and avoid misleading guarantees.
Present prices, ranges, or indicative cost categories.
Explain factors that may affect the final cost, such as location, number of examinees, case complexity, travel, report needs, or urgency.
Explain what is normally included in the appointment or service.
Explain how to request confirmation and schedule the service.
Answer common price and booking questions.
Invite the visitor to request a case-specific quote.
Add useful internal links to service, city, FAQ, or contact pages.

drafting_instructions.search_intent: Commercial price, cost, tariff, or quotation intent.
drafting_instructions.opening_rule: Start with clear price context or explain that prices depend on case factors.
structure_guidance: Present prices or ranges if available.
ai_engine_guidance: Use clear price-related headings.
Separate confirmed prices from indicative guidance.
Explain uncertainty transparently.
Avoid bait-and-switch or vague commercial wording.
drafting_instructions.faq_guidance: FAQs should answer cost, payment, travel, report, number of examinees, urgency, and quote questions.
drafting_instructions.cta_guidance: Invite the visitor to request a case-specific quote.
avoid: Guaranteed final price when variables exist

visual_roles.purpose: Show consultation or service explanation without implying fixed outcome.

pillar_page.description: Broad authoritative page that explains a core topic, connects related subtopics, supports internal linking, and acts as a semantic hub.

sections.purpose: Introduce the core topic, visitor intent, and why the topic matters.
Define the topic clearly and explain the scope of the page.
Explain the main professional, private, corporate, legal, or investigative applications.
Explain potential benefits and practical use cases without making absolute claims.
Explain the general process at a high level.
Explain limitations, consent, confidentiality, ethical use, and responsible interpretation.
Connect the pillar page to relevant service pages, city pages, pricing pages, or supporting articles.
Answer broad questions that support topical authority and search visibility.
Create a clear internal-linking hub for related pages.
Invite the visitor to request guidance or continue to the most relevant service page.

drafting_instructions.search_intent: Broad mixed informational and commercial intent around a core topic.
drafting_instructions.opening_rule: Start with a broad overview of the core topic and explain what the page covers.
structure_guidance: Include related services, FAQs, internal links, and contact.
ai_engine_guidance: Act as a semantic hub.
Use clear sections that answer broad and related queries.
Link naturally to supporting pages.
Avoid overfocusing on one narrow service.
drafting_instructions.faq_guidance: FAQs should cover broad, high-volume, and entity-building questions.
drafting_instructions.cta_guidance: Invite the visitor to continue to the most relevant service or request guidance.

visual_roles.purpose: Show a broad professional overview of the pillar topic.
Show related service or professional guidance.

educational_page.description: Educational page focused on explaining a topic, concept, methodology, process, reliability issue, or professional practice.

sections.purpose: Define the topic clearly and answer the visitor's initial search intent.
Explain why the topic matters and why it is relevant in professional practice.
Explain the central concepts, principles, methodology, or theoretical foundations.
Explain how the concept is applied in real situations or professional practice.
Clarify misconceptions, limitations, and responsible interpretation.
Answer educational and topic-specific questions.
Offer a non-commercial next step for readers who want additional guidance.
Link to relevant educational, pillar, FAQ, or supporting pages.

drafting_instructions.opening_rule: Start by defining the topic and explaining why it matters. Do not frame the page as a service landing page.
structure_guidance: Explain why the concept matters in professional practice.
Provide topic-specific FAQs and related educational links.
ai_engine_guidance: Use precise, explanatory headings.
Answer the informational query early.
Use structured explanations that AI answer engines can summarize.
Include limitations and responsible interpretation.
Avoid turning the page into a sales page.
drafting_instructions.faq_guidance: FAQs should be educational and topic-specific, not generic service FAQs.
drafting_instructions.cta_guidance: Use a soft next step only after the explanation. The CTA should invite questions or professional guidance, not sell aggressively.
avoid: Headings such as 'Situations where this service may help'
Client pain-point opening unless the topic requires it

visual_roles.purpose: Show the educational or methodological concept of the page.
Show professional process, preparation, or explanation.
Show analysis or interpretation in a professional context.

authority_page.description: Authority-building page focused on standards, research, scientific evidence, professional associations, methodology validation, and industry guidance.

sections.purpose: Define the standard, research topic, organization, or professional concept.
Explain the research, evidence, historical background, or professional framework.
Explain why the topic is relevant to examiners, investigators, organizations, or clients.
Provide balanced context, limitations, and responsible interpretation.
Answer research, standards, and authority-related questions.
Connect the topic to related standards, research, services, or educational content.

drafting_instructions.search_intent: Authority, standards, research, professional credibility, or evidence-seeking intent.
drafting_instructions.opening_rule: Start by identifying the standard, research topic, professional body, or authority concept and why it matters.
structure_guidance: Connect to related standards, methodology, or educational pages.
ai_engine_guidance: Use entity-rich headings.
Mention relevant standards or professional organizations only when appropriate and supported.
Separate facts, professional interpretation, and practical implications.
Avoid unsupported scientific or legal claims.
drafting_instructions.faq_guidance: FAQs should address standards, research meaning, professional use, limitations, and how the topic relates to practice.
drafting_instructions.cta_guidance: Use a trust-oriented soft CTA, such as inviting readers to ask how standards apply to their case or organization.
avoid: Claims of universal acceptance or court admissibility

visual_roles.purpose: Show professional authority, standards, research, or documentation.
Show standards, research, documentation, or professional review.
Show professional relevance or examiner/client explanation.
